summary: Frontend verification of Global Presence updates: header dropdown link, animated map with trade flows, destination market list changes (Philippines/Nepal in; Saudi Arabia/Kenya/Nigeria out), commodity pills, and regressions on other About tabs + Contact page map. All 8 review requirements PASSED.
action_items: MINOR (out of scope): React console warning on /about/key-facts — 'Encountered two children with the same key'. In AboutPage.jsx line ~279 the keyFacts Cards use key={fact.label || fact.value}. Two items share label 'Different' AND value '25+' (COMMODITIES TRADED and COUNTRIES SERVED), causing a duplicate-key warning. Suggest key={fact.sub} which is unique.
critical_code_review_comments: AboutPage.jsx keyFacts card key collision — use fact.sub or a stable index-based key.

AboutPage.jsx GlobalPresence() re-declares Destination Markets list inline (16 items) that mirrors destinationMarkers in AnimatedOfficeMap.jsx. Consider extracting to /src/data/geo.js as a single source of truth to prevent drift.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Verified via Playwright on production preview URL: (1) Header About Us dropdown order = Who We Are, Strengths, Key Facts, Global Presence, Memberships; dropdown-link-global-presence navigates to /about/global-presence. (2) animated-office-map renders on Global Presence with 16 <path> and 8 <animateMotion> elements inside its SVG (Canada/Ukraine/Brazil/Australia -> Doha in gold; Doha -> Türkiye/Egypt/India/Indonesia in navy). (3) Internal legend chip shows Trading Office/Origination/Destination Market. (4) 9 commodity pills present (Wheat, Barley, Corn, Feed ingredients, Oilseeds, Pulses, Rice, Sugar, Coffee). (5) map-legend-tradingoffices=Doha (HQ)/Geneva/Istanbul/Dubai/Singapore. map-legend-origination=Canada/Brazil/Ukraine/Russia/Kazakhstan/Australia. map-legend-destinationmarkets contains Philippines and Nepal; does NOT contain 'The Philippines', 'Saudi Arabia', 'Kenya', or 'Nigeria'. (6) 4 destination-card-* cards: middleeastlevant, northafrica, southasia (has Nepal), southeastasia (has Philippines). (7) Other About tabs load without map. (8) Contact page map still shows Trading Office + Origination only, no destination markers or trade flows (paths=0, animateMotion=0).
